description_long: This is a standard skateboard with a slightly concave wooden deck, showing signs of wear and use, especially along the edges and surface. The deck is covered with a dark, likely black, grip tape that appears scuffed and faded in the center from repeated use. The skateboard is equipped with four small, hard wheels attached to metal trucks, which are mounted underneath the deck. The wheels are a neutral color, possibly gray or black, and the trucks are metallic, showing a standard kingpin design. The sides of the deck reveal the layered construction typical of plywood skateboards, with a natural wood color visible along the edges. No visible graphics, logos, or decorative elements are present on the underside or top of the deck.
description: A well-used skateboard with a black, worn grip tape, natural wood edges, and standard metal trucks with small hard wheels. The deck shows scuffing and no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, concave deck, natural wood edges, and both sets of wheels and trucks.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the width of the deck, the grip tape's wear, and the rounded nose shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the skateboard's profile, deck curvature, and wheel placement.
description_view_3: End-on view from the tail, showing the deck's width, grip tape wear, and the rounded tail shape.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small, hard, gray, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, metallic color, no visible branding, standard mounting
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, worn and scuffed, no visible graphics or text
